message:
cli: Fix PostToolUse commit tracking

Look for agentlogs link in tool_input.command instead of tool_response,
since git commit output only shows the subject line, not the full message
body where the link is appended.

Also parse commit SHA directly from git output instead of shelling out.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/y6n0lmn968
